author: Central Brain Trust
description: Mark folders and notes with color labels from the right-click menu — 12 calendar-style colors you can add or remove anytime. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Central Brain Trust
manifest.description: Mark folders and notes with color labels from the right-click menu — 12 calendar-style colors you can add or remove anytime.
manifest.name: Color Marker

name: Color Marker

releases.author: ruisloan
releases.description:
Initial release 🎨

- Right-click any folder or note → "Color marker" → pick one of 12 calendar-style colors
- Colored dot + translucent glass pill on the item's name in the file explorer
- Colors persist across restarts and follow items when renamed or moved
- "Remove color" anytime from the same menu
- Works on desktop and mobile
